pageTitle: Have you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?
caption: Stop or delay an eviction
heading: Have you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?
question: Have you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?

revealedHwfQuestion.label: Enter your help with fees reference number. You will have received this number when you applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application.

errors.alreadyAppliedForHelp: Confirm whether you have already applied for help with your counterclaim fee
errors.hwfReference: You must enter a reference number for Help with Fees
